title: CONTACT ME
description: I’m always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and exciting projects. If you have any questions or just want to say hello, feel free to send me a message.
I’ll be happy to respond as soon as possible!

faq.question: What kind of projects do you accept?
faq.answer: I collaborate on end-to-end web applications, marketing sites with advanced animation, and UX audits for existing React or Next.js products.

faq.question: How soon can we start working together?
faq.answer: Send me the project scope and preferred timeline. I usually reply within one business day and can begin within two weeks for most engagements.
